title: SoFi Q4 2023 Earnings Beat Results
text: SoFi reported fourth quarter 2023 EPS of $0.13, $0.02 better than the analyst estimate of $0.11, and revenue of $1.03B versus the consensus estimate of $973.43M. SoFi delivered $594 million in adjusted net revenue, representing 34% year-over-year growth, and generated $181 million in adjusted EBITDA at a 30% margin. In Q4 2023, SoFi added 585,000 new members, and their overall member count grew 44% year-over-year to 7.54 million. SoFi's deposits finished 2023 at $18.62 billion, increasing by $11.3 billion throughout the year. SoFi Technologies provided Q1 2026 revenue guidance of $1.04B versus the analyst consensus of $1.04B, and full-year 2026 revenue guidance of $4.66B versus the analyst consensus of $4.55B. The company demonstrated consistent execution with record deposit growth and member acquisition, setting up strong momentum for 2024.
